nodes.name: Arachnothera
nodes.summary: Arachnothera（Arachnothera）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联13种鸟类，如Thick-billed spiderhunter、Pale spiderhunter、长嘴捕蛛鸟等13种鸟类。

nodes.name: Streaky-breasted spiderhunter
nodes.summary: Streaky-breasted spiderhunter（Arachnothera affinis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Streaky-breasted spiderhunter。

nodes.name: Streaky-breasted spiderhunter
nodes.summary: The streaky-breasted spiderhunter (Arachnothera affinis) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is found in Java and Bali. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is sometimes considered conspecific with the grey-breasted spiderhunter. References
nodes.shortSummary: The streaky-breasted spiderhunter (Arachnothera affinis) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is found in Java and Bali.
